test-case.name: AsyncTurnIntegrator_ConvertsWorkerFaultToFallbackResult

test-case.name: AsyncTurnIntegrator_DoesNotCompleteWhileWorkerPlanIsStillRunning
test-case.output: [TacticalAI] async-start actor=team-0-slot-0 profile=running snapshot=0e402ab2d33d4984e66195de567d28ddc4436ee17c893da898c9fc75a45dca44 decisionId=1 [TacticalAI] async-complete actor=team-0-slot-0 decisionId=1 [TacticalAI] plan actor=team-0-slot-0 best=Wait score=12 depth=2 fallbackCount=0 ranked=Wait opponentResponse=not-covered [TacticalAI] started actor=team-0-slot-0 Wait

test-case.name: AsyncTurnIntegrator_FallsBackWhenCurrentSnapshotHashChangesBeforeConsume
test-case.output: [TacticalAI] async-start actor=team-0-slot-0 profile=stale snapshot=0e402ab2d33d4984e66195de567d28ddc4436ee17c893da898c9fc75a45dca44 decisionId=1 [TacticalAI] async-complete actor=team-0-slot-0 decisionId=1 [TacticalAI] plan actor=team-0-slot-0 best=Wait score=12 depth=2 fallbackCount=0 ranked=Wait opponentResponse=not-covered [TacticalAI] async-stale actor=team-0-slot-0 decisionId=1 reason=SnapshotHashChanged

test-case.name: TryStartTurn_ReturnsFallback_WhenBridgeReportsNoLegalAction
test-case.output: [TacticalAI] planning actor=team-0-slot-0 profile=Normal [TacticalAI] plan actor=team-0-slot-0 best=Skill skill=BattleCry target=team-1-slot-0 score=42.5 depth=3 fallbackCount=0 ranked=Skill:BattleCry opponentResponse=covered

test-case.name: TryStartTurn_ReturnsFallback_WhenPlanIsEmpty
